history_events.summary: 数据源扩充方案已生成。

body.config_fragment:
[generated_sources.providers.examplesource]
enabled = true
api_key_envs = ['EXAMPLE_API_KEY']
base_url = "https://api.example.com"
docs_url = "https://docs.example.com/source"
category = "market_data"
auth_style = "query"
response_format = "json"

config_candidate.docs_summary: REST JSON API with symbol-based quote and history endpoints.

body.generated_test_code:
from __future__ import annotations

from sentinel_alpha.infra.generated_sources.examplesource import ExamplesourceSource


def test_examplesource_adapter_builds_query_paths(monkeypatch) -> None:
    adapter = ExamplesourceSource(base_url="https://api.example.com")
    calls = []

    def fake_request(path: str, params: dict[str, str] | None = None) -> dict:
        calls.append((path, params or {}))
        return {"ok": True, "path": path, "params": params or {}}

    adapter._request_json = fake_request  # type: ignore[method-assign]
    adapter.fetch_quote("AAPL")
    adapter.fetch_history("AAPL", interval="1d", lookback="1mo")

    assert len(calls) == 2
    assert calls[0][1]["symbol"] == "AAPL"
    assert calls[1][1]["interval"] == "1d"
